case_title: JAMES F. BLANDING VS. MARCUS ANTONIO GOLDSBY ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLANDING, JAMES F. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDSBY, MARCUS ANTONIO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1215 1/2 LANE STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124 COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, ***THE RENTAL AGREEMENT IS CANCELLED*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL RATE: $29.03 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLANDING, JAMES F.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDSBY, MARCUS ANTONIO
DECLARATION OF JAMES F. BLANDING IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLANDING, JAMES F.
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON AUG-14-2025.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLANDING, JAMES F. AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDSBY, MARCUS ANTONIO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDSBY, MARCUS ANTONIO
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDSBY, MARCUS ANTONIO
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLANDING, JAMES F. AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDSBY, MARCUS ANTONIO
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLANDING, JAMES F. SERVED DEC-11-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDSBY, MARCUS ANTONIO
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-14-2025.
